scenarios.name: Baseline Heatwave
scenarios.description: Single-crisis happy path in Walled City

scenarios.name: Cascade Crisis
scenarios.description: Heatwave triggers power outage triggers hospital surge

scenarios.name: Multi-Crisis Trade-off
scenarios.description: Heatwave in Walled City + power outage in Gulberg — the trade-off scenario
scenarios.expected_tradeoff: Walled City prioritized over Gulberg (PSER vulnerability)

scenarios.name: False Alarm & Retraction
scenarios.description: Viral misinformation about Liberty Market — system retracts

scenarios.name: Degraded Mode
scenarios.description: Weather API stale, missing geo, duplicates, rate limits

scenarios.name: Staged Alerting
scenarios.description: Public alert causes evacuation congestion — Operator adapts to zone-by-zone
scenarios.expected_adaptation: Full-zone alert → congestion detected on GT Road → switch to staged zone-by-zone alerting

scenarios.name: False Negative Recovery
scenarios.description: Low-confidence AC complaint retroactively upgraded after clustering + sensor cross-reference
